strengths: Maintained stable camera positioning throughout the attempt
Demonstrated proper instrument handling and grip
weaknesses: Unable to complete the circle cutting task as evidenced by scoring
Insufficient engagement with the gauze material for effective cutting
Task execution was not clearly visible or verifiable from video evidence

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction on the gauze material
drills.targets_weakness: Unable to complete the circle cutting task

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland forceps to improve scissor entry angle and maintain gauze tension
drills.targets_weakness: Insufficient engagement with the gauze material

drills.name: Edge-entry rehearsal
drills.description: 15 starts from the gauze edge to a marked line without overshoot, focusing on clear visual confirmation of cutting progress
drills.targets_weakness: Task execution not clearly visible or verifiable

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your stable instrument handling into effective tissue manipulation and complete task execution. Ensure clear visual confirmation of each cutting phase before progressing.
